synopsis: A vast, barren salt flat slowly transforms into a landscape of giant, geometric crystals that grow and interlock into an impossible, silent structure.

shots.prompt: Camera drifts over a pristine, endless white salt flat under a clear, pale sky. The vast, barren expanse is silent and still, with minimal ripples on the salt surface stretching to the distant horizon.

Subtle, intricate geometric patterns begin to emerge on the surface of the salt, slowly growing into small, transparent crystal formations. The ground is gradually transforming into a field of nascent, sharp-edged, translucent structures, catching the soft light.

The camera drifts through a colossal labyrinth of towering, translucent salt crystals. These crystals grow into impossible, interlocking geometric shapes, forming vast, arching tunnels and cathedral-like structures that refract the ambient light into soft, shifting rainbows.

The crystal structures soften and become more fluid and organic, their sharp edges gently merging as they dissolve into a tranquil, shimmering expanse of light and color, resembling a nebula trapped within an icy, dreamlike firmament.
